reviews.comment:
Mala atención, horas de cola para cargar y ponen 1 playero para atender 4 surtidores

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, long queues to fill up, and they only have one attendant to staff four pumps.

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, me.da.verguenza lo mal que dejanna los pampeanos que somos super agradables para ayudar al turista y ellos atienden mal no te informan de nada, NO LA RECOMIENDO

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. I'm ashamed of how badly they treat us locals, who are usually so friendly and helpful to tourists. They treat us poorly and don't give you any information. I DO NOT RECOMMEND IT.

reviews.comment:
Ideal para pasar la noche. Habitación limpia. Se puede comer algo sencillo en el restaurant. Buen desayuno. La llave se pide en la estación de servicio

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for an overnight stay. Clean room. You can get a simple meal at the restaurant. Good breakfast. You pick up the key at the gas station.
